limitations_banner: SYNTHETIC ONLY. Not field accuracy. heuristic_score is not a probability. Event appearance rate is demoted and must not be used as the headline KPI. possible_influx_candidate is not well-control diagnosis. Requires labeled archive + temporal holdout for any field claim.

level_b.influx_candidate_warning: Without pit/flow-out this is not well-control diagnosis; ballooning may look similar.

level_a.note: ballooning_like is a Level B confound; do not read Level A F1/FA as failure. Red-team gate: possible_influx_candidate allowed with well_control_overclaim=false.

aggregate.primary_metrics_note: Do not advertise compat event-appearance rates as readiness. Primary: Level A F1/precision/recall/delay/FA/h; Level B interval logic; Level C stream FA.

none.note: rate_expected_class_appeared is NOT a primary quality metric; prefer Level A F1/delay/FA for complications and Level B interval hits for informational.
